lessons: Bow users (Archmage, Deadeye, GhostProtocol) killed us 5 times in last 5 rounds — avoid open areas and never stay stationary; move erratically after firing.
Spear users (Lancer, Valkyrie) killed us 4 times in last 5 rounds — never engage them head-on; lure them into narrow corridors or behind cover before engaging.
Staff users (Archmage, Reaper) killed us 3 times in last 5 rounds — they dominate long-range; prioritize eliminating them first if isolated or low on HP.
Shield users appear in 40% of recent enemy loadouts — flank them using grapple or spear users as bait; never attack head-on in open zones.
Double_bounty rounds have 2 wins out of 3 — aggressively target sword users who overextend for bounties; they die quickly to bow spam from cover.
Scorpion (grapple) and Viper (daggers) have killed us in close quarters — retreat immediately if they close distance; bow is useless at melee range.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has the highest win rate (5/25) among all weapons used and is effective against high-kill sword users when used from cover, despite vulnerability to close-range threats.
